# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-05

Vercel updated its terms to clarify that customers are responsible for actions taken by Vercel AI functionality and third-party tools connected to their account.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Updates to Legal Terms
   Anyone letting agents touch prod infrastructure needs to know the liability and billing posture shifted in writing.

2. VoidZero is joining Cloudflare
   This affects the default JS build stack many solo developers rely on and could tighten the Cloudflare-Vite path without formal lock-in.

3. Multigres v0.1 Alpha: an operating system for Postgres
   It is a credible early sign that Postgres horizontal-scaling tooling is becoming more accessible, but it is still clearly alpha.

4. Designing the hf CLI as an agent-optimized way to work with the Hub
   This is the kind of tool-surface change that can directly cut agent friction, tool calls, and token spend in real workflows.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-06-05

Draft status: not approved for posting.
